subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto that which calleth thee with the tongue of grandeur from the horizon of tribulation: "Verily, there is none other God but I, the Stranger." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ما ینادیک به لسان الکبریاء من افق البلاء انه لا اله الا انا الغریب
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @proclamation to the people of the world, @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital
